categories.label: Low Cards (1-9)
categories.description: 5 penalty points each for cards 1-9 remaining

categories.label: High Cards (10-12)
categories.description: 10 penalty points each for cards 10-12 remaining

categories.label: Skip Cards
categories.description: 15 penalty points for each Skip card remaining

categories.label: Wild Cards
categories.description: 25 penalty points for each Wild card remaining

win_condition: First to complete Phase 10; lowest penalty score breaks ties
